VCP Pipeline Conditions for 1/26/2026


Notice Text:

For Gas Day January 26, 2026, Valley Crossing Pipeline, LLC (VCP) has approved and scheduled nominations at each pipeline segment and meter station up to VCP's operational capacity. The following locations have been restricted due to consistently being below the minimum heating value per Valley Crossing Pipeline's (VCP) Statement of Operating Conditions (SOC).

VCP has scheduled and sealed receipt nominations from MR40832 - WHISTLER PIPELINE. No increases in receipts from MR40832 will be accepted.

Due to gas quality issues VCP has restricted receipt nominations to -0- from 45813 - NGPL (DEL 40813/REC 40814). No increases in receipts from MR45813 will be accepted.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.




BackPrint
